data.title: Lockheed Martin Answers the Nation's Call and Quadruples Precision Strike Missile Production
data.description: A recently signed agreement between Lockheed Martin and the Department of War has been established to provide joint forces with the necessary military advantage. The agreement, finalized on March 25, 2026, aims to ensure American superiority over any potential adversary. Lockheed Martin, listed as LMT on the New York Stock Exchange, has partnered with the Department of War in this strategic move.

data.title: BAE Systems and U.S. Department of War sign agreement to quadruple THAAD seeker production
data.description: In Falls Church, Virginia and Nashua, New Hampshire, on March 25, 2026, BAE Systems (LON: BA) announced a significant development. They have entered into a groundbreaking seven-year framework agreement with the Department of War (DoW). This agreement aims to increase production capacity fourfold and expedite the delivery of the infrared seeker used in the Terminal High Altitude system. This strategic partnership underscores BAE Systems' commitment to enhancing defense capabilities and ensuring timely supply of critical equipment to support national security efforts.

data.title: Optimism, at $0.11, eyes $0.12 recovery from oversold levels (RSI 35.28) amid bearish trend.
data.description: Trading at $0.11, Optimism's Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 35.28, indicating oversold conditions. Analysts predict a potential rebound to the resistance level of $0.12 based on technical analysis. However, the overall trend is currently facing challenges.

data.title: HBT Financial, Inc. Announces Addition to Board of Directors
data.description: In Bloomington, Illinois, on March 25, 2026, HBT Financial, Inc. revealed that Michael J. Morton has been appointed to the Board of Directors of both HBT Financial and Heartland Bank, effective from April 1, 2026. Morton's tenure will last until the HBT Financial 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, where he may seek re-election. HBT Financial, Inc. operates as the holding company for Heartland Bank and Trust Company, listed on NASDAQ as HBT.

data.title: HONEYWELL AEROSPACE, DEPARTMENT OF WAR SIGN GROUNDBREAKING AGREEMENT TO ACCELERATE PRODUCTION OF DEFENSE TECHNOLOGIES
data.description: Honeywell has pledged $500 million towards enhancing production capacity. The company recently finalized a significant supplier framework agreement with the U.S. Department of War (DoW) to expedite the expansion of their production capabilities. The agreement aims to bolster the production of [product/service] to meet the increasing demand.

data.title: Zipments Launches Embedded Trade Tools to Power the Next Generation of Logistics Providers
data.description: Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 25, 2026 - Recent developments have ushered in a new phase of intricacy in cross-border trade. The United States and Canada are experiencing swift regulatory modifications, changing tariff structures, evolving focal points in enforcement, and the introduction of fresh compliance initiatives. These factors have prompted a notable increase in inquiries related to trade, with a growing number of questions surfacing amidst this evolving landscape.

data.title: MITER Brands Launches New Sunrise Collection™ Brand
data.description: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, MITER Brands, a manufacturer of residential windows and doors, has introduced the Sunrise Collection, a high-end replacement brand aimed at enhancing the window and door experience for homeowners and dealers. This launch signifies a significant advancement for MITER Brands as they broaden their direct-to-dealer services. The Sunrise Collection merges the Restorations® Series, Vanguard® Series, and Sunrise® Series, formerly separate product lines. This move demonstrates MITER Brands' commitment to providing a comprehensive range of premium offerings for their customers.

data.title: Chewy Announces Fiscal Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Chewy, Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) has announced its financial outcomes for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year 2025, wrapping up on February 1, 2026. Notably, the fiscal quarter and year concluding on February 1, 2026 spanned 13 and 52 weeks, while the previous year (ending on February 2, 2025) covered 14 and 53 weeks, respectively. A comparison on a US GAAP basis reveals the year-on-year results for Fiscal Q4 2025 and Fiscal Year 2025. The company is recognized as a reliable hub for pet parents and partners globally.

data.title: Swedencare features ProDen PlaqueOff® Crunchy Dental Bites at Global Pet Expo
data.description: A dental supplement by Swedencare has been recognized for its effectiveness in reducing plaque, tartar, and bad breath in pets. The award-winning product, ProDen PlaqueOff® Crunchy Dental Bites, will be featured at the Global Pet Expo in Orlando, Florida from March 25 to 27. Swedencare's booth, #4401, will host the presentation of this innovative solution that aims to improve oral health in pets.

data.title: NaturVet Returns to Global Pet Expo with New Innovations and Brand Ambassadors Mario & Courtney Lopez
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on March 25, 2026, NaturVet, a well-known company specializing in pet health products, will feature its latest supplement offerings for dogs and cats. These new lines will be highlighted during a presentation focusing on proactive approaches to pet health and wellness. The event aims to promote these innovative products designed to enhance the well-being of pets.

data.title: Cognyte Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
data.description: A company based in Herzliya, Israel, Cognyte, recently announced impressive fourth-quarter and full-year financial results marked by double-digit growth. The company saw significant operating leverage, which contributed to accelerated profitability growth.

data.title: Collaborative initiative by Hong Kong regulators involves HKMA in first GBA cross-border financial oversight meeting, including Guangdong, Macao, and Shenzhen authorities to oversee banking and insurance sectors in the Greater Bay Area. (Read More)
data.description: HKMA recently participated in the first-ever cross-border regulatory meeting with authorities from Guangdong, Macao, and Shenzhen to synchronize banking and insurance supervision throughout the Greater Bay Area. The meeting aimed to foster collaboration among regulatory bodies and ensure regulatory consistency within the region. This initiative highlights the commitment to enhancing financial oversight and promoting regulatory cooperation in the area. The meeting signifies a significant step towards regional regulatory alignment, benefiting the banking and insurance sectors across the Greater Bay Area.

data.title: Garmin Ltd. schedules first quarter 2026 earnings call
data.description: In Schaffhausen, Switzerland, Garmin Ltd. (NYSE: GRMN) has announced that it will host its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call on April 29, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. EDT, led by Garmin executives. Shareholders and investors are encouraged to participate in this event.

data.title: Pelican Announces Global Partnership with Renowned Explorer and Photographer Chris Burkard
data.description: In honor of its 50th anniversary, Pelican, the top provider of protective solutions worldwide, is introducing the "Case Chronicles" series and embarking on a year-long partnership. Based in TORRANCE, Calif., the company announced this initiative on March 25, 2026, through PRNewswire. Through this series, Pelican aims to showcase its leading protective products while collaborating with partners throughout the year.

data.title: Maximo Completes 100 MW of Robotic Solar Installation
data.description: Maximo, a solar robotics company incubated by The AES Corporation, headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, achieved a significant milestone on March 25, 2026. This milestone signifies one of the most extensive robotic solar deployments completed to date. The company successfully installed a staggering 100 megawatts (MW) of solar energy, demonstrating their commitment to advancing renewable energy technologies. This accomplishment highlights the company’s expertise in innovative solar solutions and their impact on the industry.

data.title: ENNOVI Secures German Patent Approval for Adhesive-Free Lamination in Battery Cell Contacting Systems
data.description: ENNOVI, a prominent global company in e-mobility interconnects based in NECKARSULM, Germany, revealed on March 25, 2026, the launch of a verified CCS design pathway. This advancement aims to decrease uncertainty levels for prudent battery engineers. As an established engineering collaborator within the automotive sector, ENNOVI's new CCS design pathway offers a reliable solution. This initiative is set to provide guidance and assurance to battery engineers, further solidifying the company's position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Creator TV® and Convergence Announce Partnership to Bring Creator-Led Programming to Television
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Sabio Holdings (TSXV: SBIO) (OTCQB: SABOF) disclosed a new partnership for its network, Creator TV®, with Convergence, a Los Angeles entity specializing in creator management, media development, and venture opportunities. The collaboration aims to enhance content and expand strategic initiatives.
